mapper.sql: cri.id, cri.record_id, cri.class_stat_id, cri.category_id, cri.category_name, cri.item_id, cri.item_name, cri.deduct_mode, cri.deduct_count, cri.deduct_score, cri.link_type, cri.link_id, cri.link_name, cri.photo_urls, cri.issue_description, cri.checker_id, u.real_name as checker_name, cri.check_time, cri.appeal_status, cri.appeal_reason, cri.appeal_result, cri.appeal_reviewer_id, u2.real_name as appeal_reviewer_name, cri.appeal_reviewed_at, cri.is_temporary, cri.created_at, cri.updated_at
FROM check_record_items cri LEFT JOIN users u ON cri.checker_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN users u2 ON cri.appeal_reviewer_id = u2.id AND u2.deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT , ccs.class_id, c.class_name
LEFT JOIN check_record_class_stats ccs ON cri.class_stat_id = ccs.id AND ccs.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN classes c ON ccs.class_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0
ORDER BY cri.check_time DESC, cri.created_at DESC

SELECT , ccs.class_id, c.class_name, c.grade_level
LEFT JOIN check_record_class_stats ccs ON cri.class_stat_id = ccs.id AND ccs.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN classes c ON ccs.class_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE cri.deleted = 0 AND cri.record_id = #{recordId} ORDER BY c.grade_level, c.class_name, cri.category_id, cri.check_time DESC

SELECT
WHERE cri.deleted = 0 AND cri.class_stat_id = #{classStatId} ORDER BY cri.category_id, cri.item_id, cri.check_time DESC

SELECT , ccs.class_id, c.class_name, c.grade_level
LEFT JOIN check_record_class_stats ccs ON cri.class_stat_id = ccs.id AND ccs.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN classes c ON ccs.class_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE cri.deleted = 0 AND cri.record_id = #{recordId} AND cri.appeal_status = 1 ORDER BY cri.created_at ASC
mapper.update:
UPDATE check_record_items SET appeal_status = #{appealStatus}, appeal_result = #{appealResult}, appeal_reviewer_id = #{appealReviewerId}, appeal_reviewed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE deleted = 0 AND id IN
#{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO check_record_items ( id, record_id, class_stat_id, category_id, category_name, item_id, item_name, deduct_mode, deduct_count, deduct_score, link_type, link_id, link_name, photo_urls, issue_description, checker_id, check_time, appeal_status, is_temporary, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.recordId}, #{item.classStatId}, #{item.categoryId}, #{item.categoryName}, #{item.itemId}, #{item.itemName}, #{item.deductMode}, #{item.deductCount}, #{item.deductScore}, #{item.linkType}, #{item.linkId}, #{item.linkName}, #{item.photoUrls}, #{item.issueDescription}, #{item.checkerId}, #{item.checkTime}, 0, #{item.isTemporary}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_record_items WHERE deleted = 0 AND record_id = #{recordId}
